library_preparation_preflight.summary: Mockito 5 defaults to the inline Byte Buddy mock maker, which upstream notes is not suitable for GraalVM Native Image; tests need a non-inline mock maker configuration.
library_preparation_preflight.agent_guidance: Add or preserve `src/test/resources/mockito-extensions/org.mockito.plugins.MockMaker` with `mock-maker-proxy` or `org.mockito.internal.creation.proxy.ProxyMockMaker`. Write meaningful coverage around interface mocks, stubbing, verification, default answers, argument matchers/captors, and invocation inspection. Avoid relying on final-class, static, construction, or arbitrary class mocking unless local Native Image verification proves that path works.
risks: The proxy mock maker avoids code generation but only mocks interfaces, so coverage breadth is constrained.
Using Mockito's default inline mock maker is likely to fail in native-image because it depends on instrumentation/agent attachment.
The official subclass mock maker is documented as the non-inline alternative, but it still uses Byte Buddy code generation; local Gradle and Native Image verification should remain authoritative.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #3997 Update existing library: org.mockito:mockito-core:5.0.0; label=library-update-request; body_chars=270

library_preparation_preflight.agent_guidance: Add a test resource `src/test/resources/mockito-extensions/org.mockito.plugins.MockMaker` containing `org.mockito.internal.creation.proxy.ProxyMockMaker` (or the `mock-maker-proxy` alias) and focus generated tests on mocking interfaces. Avoid tests that require the default inline mock maker, class/final/static/constructor mocking, or runtime Java-agent attachment.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #3997 Update existing library: org.mockito:mockito-core:5.0.0; label=library-update-request; body_chars=270

risks: The proxy mock maker only mocks interfaces, so class-based Mockito scenarios will not be covered by this setup.
No extra dependency should be needed: `mockito-core:5.0.0` already declares `byte-buddy`, `byte-buddy-agent`, and `objenesis` in its resolved Maven dependencies.
library_preparation_preflight.summary: Mockito 5.0.0 defaults to the inline Byte Buddy mock maker, which depends on runtime instrumentation/agent attachment; meaningful Native Image coverage is reachable by configuring Mockito to use the proxy mock maker for interface-only mocks.
